name: Broadcom Inc.
summary: Broadcom Inc. is a global technology company that designs, develops, and supplies semiconductor and semiconductor-based solutions and infrastructure software. Its semiconductor portfolio spans custom accelerators (XPUs), Ethernet switching/routing silicon, NICs, PHYs, RF front-end modules, Wi-Fi/Bluetooth chips, PCIe switches, SAS/RAID controllers, and HDD/SSD solutions. Its infrastructure software includes products from CA, Symantec Enterprise Security, and VMware. Broadcom serves hyperscalers, OEMs, enterprises, and government customers across AI data centers, broadband, wireless, storage, and industrial markets.

products.name: Custom Silicon Solutions (XPUs/ASICs)
products.description: Custom accelerators and ASICs for AI, high-performance computing, networking and storage, targeting hyperscalers and AI frontier model companies.

products.name: Ethernet Switching & Routing Silicon
products.description: High-capacity, low-latency Ethernet switching and routing products for AI data centers, service providers, and enterprise networks.

products.name: Ethernet NIC Controllers
products.description: High-performance NIC controllers for virtualization, intelligent flow processing, and secure data center and machine learning connectivity.

products.name: Physical Layer Devices (PHYs)
products.description: Ethernet transceivers using proprietary DSP architecture for high-speed networking, including automotive Ethernet PHYs and camera microcontrollers.

products.name: Fiber Optic Components
products.description: Optical components enabling high-speed data transmission for Ethernet networking, storage, and telecom markets.

products.name: RF Semiconductor Devices
products.description: RF front-end modules and filters using proprietary FBAR technology for cellular applications supporting multiple frequency bands.

products.name: Wi-Fi/Bluetooth Combination Chips
products.description: High-performance, low-power integrated Wi-Fi and Bluetooth chipsets for smartphones, tablets, and wearable devices.

products.name: Custom Touch Controllers
products.description: Touch screen signal processing controllers for wireless devices.

products.name: Inductive Charging ASICs
products.description: High-efficiency, highly integrated wireless charging solutions for wireless and wearable devices.

products.name: PCIe Switches
products.description: Interconnect semiconductors supporting PCIe communication standards for AI and non-AI computing applications.

products.name: SAS & RAID Controllers
products.description: Serial attached SCSI and RAID controller/adapter products enabling secure high-speed data transmission between servers and storage devices.

products.name: Fibre Channel Host Bus Adapters
products.description: Connects host computers to fibre channel storage area networking products.

products.name: HDD & SSD Solutions
products.description: Read channel SoCs and preamplifiers providing critical data read/write electronics for hard disk drives.

products.name: VMware Infrastructure Software
products.description: Infrastructure software solutions acquired from VMware for virtualization and cloud environments.

products.name: CA Software
products.description: Enterprise infrastructure software acquired from CA, Inc.

products.name: Symantec Enterprise Security Software
products.description: Enterprise security software acquired from Symantec's enterprise division.

partnerships.description: Broadcom develops custom XPUs and Ethernet solutions for hyperscaler customers building AI data center infrastructure.
OEMs and system integrators deploy Broadcom semiconductor solutions in servers, switches, and racks for AI data centers.
